the Back Office Dashboard includes:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Trend analysis, with easy-to-read visual indicators for increases or decreases"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Powerful comparison feature, allowing you to compare by specific date ranges or periods e.g. Last Month, Last Quarter, etc"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Comparing your instore vs online sales has never been easier, especially using the Fulfilment Preference to view trends for instore vs delivery"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "A wide range of comprehensive reporting, including:"}]}, {"type": "ul", [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Purchase Orders no longer update Supplier Buy Price"}], "data-id": "purchase-orders-no-longer-update-supplier-buy-price"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "After listening to feedback from Retail Express users, we have implemented a change where editing PO Item details will no longer update or overwrite the Product Master Supplier Buy Price (regardless of how this change was initiated)."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "We recommend advising your staff of this change."}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The following actions will no longer overwrite the Master Supplier Buy Price:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Adding items to a PO"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Editing the Qty or Supplier Buy of items on a PO"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Creating or updating PO's via API"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To update the Product Master Supplier Buy price, the following actions can be taken:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Edit the product ("}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Create-and-Edit-Products", "children": [{"text": "manually"}]}, {"text": " or via "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Using-Mass-Upload-to-create-products", "children": [{"text": "Mass Upload"}]}, {"text": ")"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Edit the product via API"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Resolutions"}], "data-id": "resolutions"}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Payment and voucher buttons will be disabled in POS until the total amount owing has been calculated successfully"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Resolved an issue with Special Orders Fulfilment where under specific circumstances products incorrectly showed as Available to be Picked"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Performance improvements made to Franchise Connect Sales Report"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]},
